text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is approaching. King Halo asks
Seiun Sky why she continues to perform well if she
doesn't care about the attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky explains she just wants to win. She goes
on to say, "at your final wrong turn, you'll have
found the right path," lighting a fire in King
Halo's heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The same day, we run into another racer from the
same year, Grass Wonder. She's recovered from
an injury and is back in tip-top shape.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky tries to get her to lower her guard, but
it doesn't work. It seems the Arima Kinen won't be
won easily.
